title: Obvious Blue Axolotl
description: Makes the rare blue axolotl clearly distinguishable from the the other variants with a bright red texture.
body: ![Obvious Blue Axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc588fa067e269b252a66403629fb6221555b15.png) --- --- # Red Blue Axolotl (Visual Utility) This utility recource pack modifies the texture of the rare Blue Axolotl (1/1200 spawn chance), changing its color to a distinct bright red. ## Purpose: - Instant Identification: Eliminates visual confusion between the Blue and Cyan variants. - Breeding Efficiency: Significantly reduces the time required to identify and sort rare specimens during mass breeding. - Visibility: Provides high contrast against underwater environments and Lush Caves. > This is a client-side visual modification. It does not affect gameplay mechanics or rarity. --- ![5 Different variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5919077110ad91a37a613af3e3cca8bd35bb1a.png) ---
